articles.title: Judge blocks Pentagon order branding Anthropic a national security risk - The Washington Post
articles.description: Anthropic argued that the Trump administration was punishing it for speaking about the risks of its AI technology amid a bitter dispute with the Pentagon.
articles.content: A federal judge in San Francisco blocked a Pentagon order Thursday labeling the artificial intelligence company Anthropic a national security risk, saying officials had likely violated the law and re… [+93 chars]

articles.title: Google Translate’s real-time headphone translations feature expands to iOS and more countries - TechCrunch
articles.description: The real-time headphone translations experience keeps each speaker’s tone, emphasis, and cadence intact, so it’s easier to follow the conversation and tell who’s saying what.
articles.content:
Google announced on Thursday that “Live Translate,” its AI-powered Google Translate feature that lets you hear real-time translations in your headphones, is expanding to iOS and to more countries.
